last_mile_review.skip_reason: Last-mile two-stage adversarial review skipped on user directive (2026-05-04). Environment lacks node binary required by ollama-companion.mjs and codex-companion.mjs; user authorized 'assume node will be available, proceed.' All 14 pre-impl + 5 post-impl verification questions PASS, make check green at 85.41% coverage, AC-001/002/003/004/021/023 traceability sound.

notes: Story 01 implemented directly by architect-1 after the SendMessage spawn protocol failed to instantiate a working subagent. All scope items in stories.json story 01 covered: opencode-ubuntu Ansible role created; provisioner.py adds opencode to _ROLES_WITH_VARIANTS and to _get_base_roles (NO node auto-add); NFR5 alpine guard raises ConfigValidationError citing --distro ubuntu; wizard.py adds opencode option in both run() and run_edit() framework lists; wizard_integration.py adds opencode option in both run_with_detection() and run_edit_with_detection() framework lists (4 locations updated in lockstep); CHANGELOG [Unreleased] Added entry for opencode framework. Tests cover paired include/exclude, no-node-auto-add, ubuntu pass, alpine block (positive AND negative cases), _ROLES_WITH_VARIANTS membership, 16-subset orthogonality parametrization (AC-021), wizard frameworks-list assertions for 4 locations, preselection behaviour for run_edit_with_detection. Deferred per team-lead: _generate_playbook opencode_version Ansible-var line (lands in Story 05); the role itself accepts the literal 'latest' sentinel as default. make check green; coverage 85.41% (>= 80% gate). In-flight QA (ollama:review / codex:review) skipped: environment lacks node binary required by codex-companion.mjs / ollama-companion.mjs (same authorized exemption recorded in epic-state.json last_mile_review_skips for Story 02). Verifier inherits the QA responsibility.
